mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.tool_name AS toolName, t.description, t.resource_type AS resourceType, t.price, t.total_usage AS totalUsage FROM osh_tool t WHERE t.status = 4 AND (t.delete_flag = 0 OR t.delete_flag IS NULL) ORDER BY (0.60 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(t.total_usage, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.total_usage, 0))) FROM osh_tool x WHERE x.status = 4 AND (x.delete_flag = 0 OR x.delete_flag IS NULL)), 0), 0) + 0.25 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(t.good_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.good_count, 0))) FROM osh_tool x WHERE x.status = 4 AND (x.delete_flag = 0 OR x.delete_flag IS NULL)), 0), 0) + 0.15 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(t.collection_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.collection_count, 0))) FROM osh_tool x WHERE x.status = 4 AND (x.delete_flag = 0 OR x.delete_flag IS NULL)), 0), 0)) DESC, t.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
